settings.title: Competitive Excellence
settings.description: With patented sensor technology and advanced manufacturing, the CPP LITE hydraulic pedals offer top-tier performance for those who demand precision and an edge in competition.

settings.title: Next Generation Hydraulic System
settings.description: The CPP LITE builds upon the original CPP Hydraulic pedal with a 1.5-gen hydraulic system. Featuring a redesigned internal chamber for enhanced damping and improved compression media to reduce wear, this system also boasts an optimized piston structure and a coated hydraulic chamber for increased durability. The result is a pedal system that delivers stable, reliable performance.

settings.title: Automotive-Grade 10MPa Hydraulic Sensor
settings.description: CPP LITE features a 10MPa high-precision sensor that provides stable and precise brake pressure sensoring , enabling fine-tuned braking performance. Its wide range allows professional sim racers to fully harness realistic racing dynamics.

settings.title: Race-Ready Materials and Precision Engineering
settings.description:
Made from high-spec aluminum alloy processed through T6 heat treatment and precision CNC machining.

Sandblasting and anodization processes provide exceptional texture and appearance.

settings.title: Uncompromising Performance
settings.description: Designed for drivers focused on lap times and stability, every component undergoes rigorous design, simulation, and testing. This ensures maximum braking force, allowing drivers to maintain full concentration through every corner.

settings.title: True-to-Life Clutch Pedal Design
settings.description: The CPP LITE features a uniquely designed clutch pedal structure, utilizing a lever mechanism to create a non-linear force-travel relationship. This accurately simulates the characteristics of a real car's clutch diaphragm spring for a more authentic driving experience.

settings.title: Tailored to Your Unique Driving Style
settings.description:
Every driver has a distinct approach to driving. 

Starting from the perspective of professional racers, the CPP series is designed for maximum adjustability to meet individual preferences. Whether it's adapting to different seating positions or fine-tuning pedal feel, the CPP LITE excels. Throttle, brake, and clutch all offer stepped force adjustments and further fine-tuning, ensuring a perfect match to your personal driving style.

settings.title: M-DVF Vibration Module
settings.description:
Equipped with the M-DVF vibration feedback module as standard, addressing crucial information often missing in sim racing.

CONSPIT continues to work closely with SimHub on product development, CPP LITE rumble module supports SimHub Shakelt Motors, offering comprehensive customization options for various conditions within SimHub.

settings.title: Full Metal Base Plate (Optional)
settings.description: For those seeking a more premium aesthetic and performance, we offer the Full Metal Base Plate. Precision CNC machining ensures flawless consistency, while anodizing enhances durability and keeps the sleek appearance intact over time.
